❦The Annals❦ — ⚘ Atlas✦ Wiki
The realm obeys these dials at once; the Chronicle remembers what you did.
⌖ acts ask for a place — click the map. Acts are ink in the chronicle; they cannot be blotted out.
Load a grayscale heightmap (light = high ground) and paste settlement placements to forge your own world. Grid runs 0–767; anything darker than mid-grey becomes sea.
Overlays live under the 🗺 button, top right.
drag to orbit · wheel to zoom · right-drag to pan · double-click to travel · click to inspect
by touch: one finger orbits · pinch zooms · two fingers pan · tap inspects · double-tap travels
space pause · 1–5 speed · T territories · C watch · G director · H hide the court · L labels · F fps · Esc release
the sun keeps its own slow time; the date is the realm’s
⚖ Ledger
❧ The Chronicle

✦ M
click to travel · Esc to close

a history, written as it happens

The chronicle is torn

Some fault has crept into the manuscript.
